basic_details.job_title: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology ISM Dhanbad (IIT(ISM) Dhanbad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology ISM Dhanbad (IIT(ISM) Dhanbad) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitism.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc. or equivalent in Electronics & Communication Engineering/Computer Science/Mathematics/Engineering Physics/Engineering Mathematics, GATE or CSIR/UGC NET or National level examination qualification
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc. or equivalent in streams like Electronics & Communication Engineering /Computer Science/Mathematics/Engineering Physics/Engineering Mathematics with good academic background. The candidate should be qualified in GATE or CSIR/UGC NET or any other National level examination conducted by the Central Government Departments/Institutions.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month + 20% HRA for two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month + 20% HRA for the third year.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT(ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc. or equivalent in streams like Electronics & Communication Engineering /Computer Science/Mathematics/Engineering Physics/Engineering Mathematics with good academic background. The candidate should be qualified in GATE or CSIR/UGC NET or any other National level examination conducted by the Central Government Departments/Institutions.

content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- per month + 20% HRA for two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month + 20% HRA for the third year.

content_sections.heading: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT(ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post announced by IIT(ISM) Dhanbad in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc. or equivalent degree in specific fields like Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science, Mathematics, etc., and must have qualified in GATE or CSIR/UGC NET.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary for the JRF position is Rs. 37,000/- per month + 20% HRA for the first two years, and Rs. 42,000/- per month + 20% HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad JRF recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
